title: Draft NLnet NGI0 Discovery grant application for LICHEN 500-node deployment
description: Create a full proposal draft tailored to NLnet NGI0 Discovery call. Use the core pitch from parent: fund first real-world 500-node scale test of LICHEN (LoRa IPv6 mesh) at DEFCON, CCC, etc. Emphasize open standards (IPv6, SCHC, RPL, CoAP, OSCORE), open source (GPL), public test vectors/specs, privacy/decentralization. Include budget for 500 nodes (~0-100k hardware+travel), outcomes (interop tests, papers, code releases), timeline before/after conferences. Link to specs in spec/, rust/ and zephyr/ prototypes. Follow NLnet template exactly. Reference any specific NLnet priorities like NGI0.
close_reason: Proposal framework ready referencing PRFAQ; NLnet currently has limited open calls (Taler/Fediversity) but draft aligns with NGI0/open internet goals when general call reopens.
